titleEn: Don’t Miss Greenhouse Grower’s Digital Deep Dive on Structures
titleZh: 温室结构数字化深度报告：自动化与节能升级指南
summaryZh: 该报告由Greenhouse Grower发布，聚焦温室结构的最新进展与创新，涵盖温室是否需要改造或重建、开放式屋顶的四大优势、围绕自动化进行温室设计、以及如何防止温室在极端冬季天气中倒塌等关键议题。报告以可下载PDF形式呈现，汇集了编辑精选的最新文章，旨在帮助种植者应对自动化接入、能源成本、灌溉问题等夏季升级需求。虽然内容主要面向温室园艺，但其中关于自动化集成与结构优化的思路对智慧畜牧的设施农业有参考价值。
featuredReason: 尽管该报告主要针对温室种植业，但其关于自动化设计、结构升级和抗灾能力的讨论，可为智慧畜牧中养殖设施（如智能环控畜舍）的改造与新建提供跨领域借鉴，尤其适合关注设施农业自动化的从业者参考。
contentFull: By Greenhouse Grower staff|June 29, 2026 Greenhouse Grower‘s Digital Deep Dives are designed to provide greenhouse professionals with an up-to-date understanding of a range of key industry topics, all in one information-rich digital resource produced as a downloadable PDF. Each report focuses on key industry topics that aggregate the latest relevant articles written by and compiled by our editors. In the midst of summer, new greenhouse structures and upgrades are being implemented to help growers with automation access, energy costs, irrigation concerns, and more. So, what’s the latest news in the world of structures for breeders and growers? This downloadable report offers insights into new advancements and research innovations in structures. In this report, you’ll find information on: Does Your Greenhouse Need a Retrofit or Rebuild? 4 Reasons to Upgrade to an Open-Roof Greenhouse How to Design Your Greenhouse Around Automation Protecting Greenhouses from Collapse in Severe Winter Weather Fill out the brief form below to download the report! contentHtml:
This June 2026 Digital Deep Dive downloadable report covers some of the latest news on structures.
The post Don’t Miss Greenhouse Grower’s Digital Deep Dive on Structures appeared first on Greenhouse Grower.
